Range across sources: 30.24% (Yahoo Finance) to 37.61% (CNBC). Using Yahoo Finance as the most conservative credible source, deviation is 7.9%. Even vs CNBC (37.61%), deviation is 18.1% — below 20% threshold.
No reliable ROA TTM figure found in web search results. Moving on per protocol.

summary: META facts bundles were using a net_margin of 30.08% which appears to be based on a pre-Q1 2026 TTM calculation. Following the strong Q1 2026 earnings beat (EPS $10.44 vs $6.65 est, net income $26.8B = 47.6% margin), the post-Q1 TTM net margin rose to approximately 37.42% (CNBC). This 24.4% deviation exceeds the 20% correction threshold. All other metrics (operating_margin, P/E, market_cap, revenue, ROE) were within acceptable tolerances.
